# Novum Organum

*[Francis Bacon](../philosophers/bacon.md) · 1620*

The manifesto of the modern experimental method, in which Bacon opposes to Aristotle's logic a new **induction** grounded in observation. He there denounces the **idols**, the prejudices that distort the mind, in order to found a science serving the mastery of nature.
